characters.name: Geoffrey
characters.description: Geoffreyis a feminine singing agent. He is portrayed byJai Rodriguez. He is a flamboyant talent agent who lives in Los Angeles whoReba Gallaghercame to start back her singing career, who he sort of turns down because the "vioce doesn't matter anymore" and he thinks they have to be young and sexy. He may bring Reba back to sing.

characters.name: Jerry Beta
characters.description: Jerry Beta, also known asMr. Betais the general manager of the record company thatReba Gallagherworks for.Geoffrey alsoworks for Mr. Beta and works as a suprovisor for the record company.

characters.name: June Gallagher
characters.description: June GallagherisReba Gallagher's daughter in theABCshow "Malibu Country". She is portrayed byJuliette Angelo. She is the daughter of Reba, and she was happy to move to Malibu. On her first day, she became friends with a gay kid, well, supposed gay kid namedSagewho they practiced kissing with and Reba caught them, June was angry, and Reba said they where moving back, which June disliked, and they decided to stay and it is possible that her and Sage may become more than friends.

characters.name: Kim
characters.description: Kimis an upbeat, stalkerish, friendly, neighbor toReba Gallagherand her family. She is portrayed by actressSara Rue. She is a very upbeat share-too-much, hug-too-freely trophy wife and neighbor with a gay teenage son, to Reba andLillie Mae. She comes right in and hugs them on the day they moved in, because she "saw them through the window", and she hugged Lillie Mae for a long time and Lillie Mae claimed she unhooked her brazer. She has a gay, well so called, son namedSagewho practices kissing with Reba's daughter,June.

characters.name: Lillie Mae
characters.description: Lillie MaeisReba Gallagher's mother in the showMalibu Country. She is portrayed byLily Tomlin. She was happy that Reba divorced her husband so they could move to the beach, and she loved it. She callsSagethe "little gay boy" thatJunealways hangs out with. She spends most of her time tanning with full clothes on and saying random things. She had an "honest to god doctor who gave her a 'Happy Lollie'" Which was a lollipop with Marijuana in it, who Reba tries to take away from her but Lillie doesn't let go.

characters.name: Reba Gallagher
characters.description: Reba Mackenzie (Gallagher)is the main character in the showMalibu Country. She is portrayed by actressReba McEntire. Reba Mackenzie was married to Bobby Gallagher and they have two children, Cash (16) and June (14). Bobby cheated on her (it's assumed more than once) and though she promised to stand by him no matter what she couldn't do it since he had broken her trust. She moved to a beach house in Malibu, that she never knew Bobby owned, with her mother and the two children. Reba was once a singer (InBased On A True Storywe learn she has at least 2 albums) but she ended her career to have her family, now that she is without Bobby she wants to start it up again but it is harder than she imagined since she isn't as young as she once was. In the pilot episode a young man named Geoffrey tells Reba that since she isn't youngorsexy that her only to make it in show business is to have a really good hook, so she writes an inspiring song about how she can go on even though she's been wronged. The man at the label says that he loves the song but he would rather some else sing it (Travie McCoy). Reba Mackenzie fights to keep her song and her career and she continues fighting for what she knows in her heart that she deserves. Reba is a lovable character who is easy to relate with as a mother trying to support her family and provide a memorable childhood. She can be very strongheaded which puts her in awkward positions that she struggles to escape. Template:Gallery

characters.name: Sage
characters.description: Sage is June's friend, possibly more then friends. In the pilot it is said that he might be gay during that episode him and June were practice kissing when Reba found out she was furious. Sage is the step son of Kim. He also lives right next door to Reba and the others.
